scenarios.name: remember: stores fact to journal
scenarios.cli_command: ar write codex-compat-fact: sky is blue [2026-06-18T14-32-07] --project codex-compat-test

scenarios.name: remember: routes to palace with context hint
scenarios.cli_command: ar palace write architecture codex-compat-arch: MCP tools validated at 2026-06-18T14-32-07 --project codex-compat-test

scenarios.name: recall: retrieves fact written by remember
scenarios.cli_command: ar search sky is blue --project codex-compat-test

scenarios.name: check: alignment via insight recall
scenarios.cli_command: ar recall test compatibility codex --project codex-compat-test

scenarios.name: session_end: saves journal entry
scenarios.cli_command: ar write codex-compat-session-end: Codex compat test run completed at 2026-06-18T14-32-07. All MCP tools exercised via ar CLI. --section next --project codex-compat-test

scenarios.name: cross-session recall: fact persists after session_end
digest: store cached analysis result
scenarios.cli_command: ar digest store Codex compat digest 2026-06-18T14-32-07 --scope codex compatibility verification --content MCP tools verified at 2026-06-18T14-32-07: session_start, remember, recall, check, session_end, digest --project codex-compat-test
